data.body:
Music Theory question:

The Four Seasons, Summer - Vivaldi. Measure 62 intrigued me, seems to be a B diminished. But the chord sequence of A flat MAJ 7 > b diminished > G baffles me. Seems an odd sequence. Or is this Vivaldi's genius?

Any thoughts on m. 62? 
Corrections to chords in m. 55 - 64?

Tx
